description: Verb mode, formatting strip. `**see** bd-target` counts as 3-char verb, so bd-target falls inside the 32-char proximity window even with bold wrappers. Plain `bd-isolated` nearby has no verb and is dropped. Inline-code `bd-code` emits inline_code (strict sigil kept in verb mode).

issues.title: formatting strip scenarios
issues.description:
**see** bd-target remains in reach.
bd-isolated has no verb on its line.
Later: `bd-code` wraps inline.
